---
name: demo
description: which/type/hash probe fixture for contract lint — probe operands are not invocations
---

Several probe forms can confirm whether the binary is reachable:

```bash
which cortex-worktree-create
```

```bash
type cortex-worktree-create
```

```bash
hash cortex-worktree-create
```

None of these constitute a real invocation of the console-script.
